title: Jeet Travis
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Bounty hunter |image=[[File:JeetTravis.jpg]] |name=Jeet Travis |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{GalaxyCite|2|Tales from Mos Eisley: Heggs' Tale}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Auburn]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Fair enough. Oh— ''Heggs'' is the name. Sam Heggs.''"
"''Jeet Travis, and that's my ''last'' bottle.''"
"''Well, Mr. Travis, it's quite a tale. 'Nuff to ''parch'' a man. Now grumph nectar is pure ambrosia, but—''"
"''All right. One sip. More ''if'' I like the story.|Sam Heggs and Jeet Travis talk after the former asks for some Vaschean Rye|}} '''Jeet Travis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]. He drank [[Vaschean rye/Legends|Vaschean rye]], and was once conned out of a bottle of it by [[Sam Heggs]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxyCite|2|Tales from Mos Eisley: Heggs' Tale}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Travis, Jeet}} [[Category:Bounty hunters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
